title: [security] OSCORE protect_request label inconsistency and incomplete error path cleanup
description: In lichen/subsys/lichen/oscore/oscore.c:1493-1531 early error paths (invalid param, uninitialized seq, seq exhausted) still goto cleanup_protect_request which no longer exists (renamed to common_wipe:1619 in 7baadd563). Later paths use common_wipe. nvm_failed:1626 comment references outdated "cleanup_protect_request". This prevents compilation and breaks the critical SSN rollback + wipe logic for preventing AES-CCM nonce reuse on NVM failure (RFC 8613 §7.2, §8.4). Affects key/seq handling, OSCORE MIC/tag computation paths. See also oscore.h comments and project-LICHEN-ow3c.1.3.* beads.
